reasoning: The high packet loss on the A1 interface prevents the Non-RT RIC from delivering necessary policies to the Near-RT RIC, which then propagates the failure downstream to the E2 and F1 interfaces, affecting the O-CU and O-DU.
actionable_steps:
1. Perform a physical and logical layer audit of the A1 interface link between the Non-RT RIC and Near-RT RIC.
2. Investigate potential network congestion, faulty cabling, or misconfigured firewall rules on the A1 path.
3. Verify the health of the Non-RT RIC egress and Near-RT RIC ingress ports.
